name: Italian Barley (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, cook onions, green peppers, and garlic until lightly browned. Add small amounts of water if necessary to prevent drying.
2. Add tomatoes, spices (oregano and basil), and water. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Stir in barley and reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 50 minutes, or until the barley is tender and all water has been absorbed. Stir occasionally while cooking and add more water if necessary.
